description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named python36. Add a job called python36 that runs on the python:3.6 Docker image, is allowed to fail, and always runs. The job executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -q -y, apt-get install -y python3-dev python3-pip python3-setuptools, pip install -r requirements.txt, python3 setup.py install, superchaind start > /dev/null 2>&1 &, sleep 2, and python3 setup.py test. No caches, artifacts, services, or extra variables are defined.
